description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional lounge with a modern, minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, light-colored fabric. The lounge features three main seating sections joined at a right angle, forming a spacious corner configuration ideal for group seating. Each section has thick, plush seat and back cushions that are seamlessly integrated into the frame, providing a uniform and inviting appearance. The backrests are moderately high and slightly rounded, offering ergonomic support without any visible tufting or decorative stitching. Low-profile, straight armrests are present at both ends, matching the height of the backrest and maintaining the clean lines of the design. The lounge is elevated on slender, metallic legs, giving it a light, airy feel and making it suitable for contemporary urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale outdoor patios.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional lounge with smooth, light upholstery, integrated cushions, and slender metallic legs. Its modern, minimalist design features low-profile armrests and a spacious corner configuration.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full L-shaped layout, with all seat and back cushions visible and the corner configuration clearly defined.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of one section, the uniform height of the backrest and armrest, and the slim metallic legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the depth of the shorter section, the rounded backrest, and the continuous seat cushions.
description_view_3: Reverse top-down view emphasizing the open seating area, the arrangement of cushions, and the symmetry of the armrests.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six large, attached seat cushions and six matching back cushions arranged in an L-shape, with a single cushion at the corner; all cushions are uniform in size and seamlessly integrated.
attribute_backrest_design: Moderately high, straight backrest with a slight curve at the corners, segmented to match each seat, and no visible tufting or headrests.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present at both ends, straight, low-profile, and padded to match the backrest height.
attribute_leg_style: Short, slender, straight metallic legs with a polished finish, evenly spaced at the corners and along the base for support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth upholstery with no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching; uniform and minimalist appearance.
